meaning: adj.粗鲁的,无礼的,猛烈的,残暴的,粗鲁无礼的
examples: The man was downright rude to us.
Why are you so rude to your mother?
He became surly and rude toward me.
If the GT-R's engineers had wanted to silence all these rude noises, they certainly could have.
Dromgoole described John Marston's satire, written around 1603, as "a dizzyingly funny, rude and wild play".
